subrequests.text: Fix the project-list page so it renders every project in the existing freelancer time-tracking app; it currently 500s when a project's billable_rate is null.
subrequests.reason: 'app you already built' + existing behavior is wrong (list 500s instead of rendering) + repair to spec, no new capability + no new tech = bugfix against an existing codebase. One defect, not compound.
